TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DISTINCT BD.MTH_TM_ID, BD.BASEL_ACCT_ID, SS.BLOCK_RECL_CD, AD.OS_BAL_AMT, BD.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD, PRAD.OS_BAL_AMT AS PREV_OS_BAL_AMT, PRBD.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD AS PREV_PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD FROM QZHANG.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT SS
JOIN QZHANG.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_ACCT_DRVD_VARS AD ON AD.BASEL_ACCT_ID=SS.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND AD.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND AD.MTH_TM_ID=SS.MTH_TM_ID
JOIN QZHANG.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS BD ON BD.BASEL_ACCT_ID=SS.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND BD.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND BD.MTH_TM_ID=SS.MTH_TM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN QZHANG.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_ACCT_DRVD_VARS PRAD ON PRAD.BASEL_ACCT_ID=SS.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND PRAD.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID-40
LEFT OUTER JOIN QZHANG.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS PRBD ON PRBD.BASEL_ACCT_ID=SS.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND PRBD.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID-40

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: DECODE(TRUE, LTRIM(RTRIM(PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD)) ='CHG' AND LTRIM(RTRIM(PREV_PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD))= 'CHG' AND SUBSTR(LTRIM(RTRIM(BLOCK_RECL_CD)),1,1)='D' AND OS_BAL_AMT =0 AND PREV_OS_BAL_AMT <> 0, 0, IN(LTRIM(RTRIM(PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD)), 'DEF', 'CHG')=1 AND LTRIM(RTRIM(PREV_PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD)) <> 'CUR' , -1*(OS_BAL_AMT- PREV_OS_BAL_AMT), LTRIM(RTRIM(PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD)) ='CUR' AND IN(LTRIM(RTRIM(PREV_PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD)), 'DEF', 'CHG')=1, PREV_OS_BAL_AMT , NULL)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: o_MTH_RCVRY_AMT

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-C-0-4
(where the main script is called from) $$SCRIPT_DIR=/owdev/scripts (the environment; DEV, SYS, UAT, PROD) $$ENVMNT=DEV (the project folder without prefix) $$PROJ_FOLDR=STGN_SCENE (the workflow and session name for the abend log file and triger) $$WRKFLW_SESS=wf_STGN_SCENE_Load_DIMs.s_STGN_SCENE_INS_UPD_SCENE_MBR_ACCT_ACTY_TP_DIM
TASK.NAME: cmd_post_session_failure_alert

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DISTINCT BD.MTH_TM_ID, BD.BASEL_ACCT_ID, SS.BLOCK_RECL_CD, AD.OS_BAL_AMT, BD.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD, PRAD.OS_BAL_AMT AS PREV_OS_BAL_AMT, PRBD.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD AS PREV_PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT SS
JOIN $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_ACCT_DRVD_VARS AD ON AD.BASEL_ACCT_ID=SS.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND AD.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND AD.MTH_TM_ID=SS.MTH_TM_ID
JOIN $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS BD ON BD.BASEL_ACCT_ID=SS.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND BD.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND BD.MTH_TM_ID=SS.MTH_TM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_ACCT_DRVD_VARS PRAD ON PRAD.BASEL_ACCT_ID=SS.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND PRAD.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID-40
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS PRBD ON PRBD.BASEL_ACCT_ID=SS.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND PRBD.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID-40

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_ACCT_RCVRY.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_ACCT_RCVRY.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_ACCT_RCVRY.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_ACCT_RCVRY.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_ACCT_RCVRY.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_ACCT_RCVRY.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: SHARED
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Where all shared objects will reside. Only save sources, targets, transformations and mapplets in this folder. Never save any mappings in here!!!!
